title: `Akbowr #5907
definition:
Achbor = "mouse"

 1) father of king Baal-hanan of Edom
 2) son of Michaiah and contemporary of king Josiah of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Achbor = "mouse"

 1) father of king Baal-hanan of Edom
 2) son of Michaiah and contemporary of king Josiah of Judah

    NASB:  mouse, an Isr., also an Edomite
